title: The Oilfields (Regulation and Development) Act, 1948
full_text: The Oilfields (Regulation and Development) Act, 1948 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 194853 Act Number: 53 Enactment Date: 1948-09-08 Act Year: 1948 Short Title: The Oilfields (Regulation and Development) Act, 1948 Long Title: An Act to provide for the regulation of oilfields and for the development of mineral oil resources. Ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas Enforcement Date: 25-10-1949 Notification: 25th October, 1949 see Notification No. M-II-155 (24)-I, dated 18th October 1949, Gazette of India, Extraordinary, 1949. Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Oilfields (Regulation and Development) Act, 1948 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. [Omitted.]. Section 3. Definitions. Section 4. No petroleum lease to be valid unless it is in accordance with this Act. Section 4A. prospecting, etc., of mineral oils. Section 5. Power to make rules as respects petroleum leases. Show Related Subordinates Section 6. Power to make rules as respects mineral oils development. Show Related Subordinates Section 6A. Royalties in respect of mineral oils. Section 7. Power to make rules for modification of existing leases. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Delegation. Section 9. Penalties. Section 9A. Adjudication. Section 9B. Appeal. Section 10. Laying of rules and notifications. Section 11. Power of inspection. Section 12. Relaxation of rules in special cases. Section 13. Act to be binding on the Government. Section 13A. Validity of leases and licenses. Section 14. Protection of action taken in good faith. Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE.
